meta.pageTitle: Giovanna Parissi Reyes — Civil Engineer · Construction Supervisor
meta.description: Professional CV of Giovanna Parissi Reyes, Civil Engineer with 6+ years in construction supervision and site residency for large-scale luxury hotel projects in Cancún. Grand Hyatt, Emporio, ZIVALAM.

profile.name: Giovanna Parissi Reyes
profile.title: Civil Engineer · Construction Supervisor & Site Resident Engineer

summary.label: About Me
paragraphs: Civil Engineer with over 6 years of experience in construction supervision and site residency for large-scale luxury hotel projects along the Mexican Caribbean coast. Involved in the construction and completion of internationally branded hotels such as Grand Hyatt and Emporio in Puerto Cancún.

Full technical command: from structural, architectural, and hydro-sanitary blueprint interpretation to estimation control, quantity surveys, subcontractor payroll management, and material auditing. Proficient in AutoCAD and Neodata for progress tracking and budget control.

jobs.title: Site Resident & Construction Supervisor
jobs.company: Grupo Constructor Cantepec S.A. de C.V.
bullets: Grand Hyatt Puerto Cancún Hotel (Sep 2022 – present) — Full site residency in premium finishes, restaurants, pool areas, and public spaces of a 5-star international hotel.
Hotel Emporio KM.16, buildings B, C, and D — Supervision of masonry, drywall, finishes, pools, and restaurant areas.
Reading and interpretation of structural, architectural, and hydro-sanitary blueprints.
Preparation of progress estimates and quantity surveys for physical progress control.
Subcontractor payroll review and on-site material consumption auditing.
Material quantity takeoffs and warehouse requisition preparation.

jobs.title: Construction Supervisor · Security & Site Resident
bullets: Hotel Emporio Torre A — Full supervision and site residency for a high-rise hotel building.
Technical specification verification and blueprint compliance review.
Supervision of HVAC (air conditioning) and electronic security system installations.
Supervision of black iron piping and NFPA fire suppression system installations.
Preparation of progress estimates and quantity surveys for client billing.

jobs.title: Construction Supervisor
bullets: ZIVALAM and KALAM Residential Complexes — Supervision of high-end residential construction.
Reading and interpretation of architectural and structural blueprints.
Material quantity takeoffs and procurement requisition preparation.
Supervision of masonry, hydro-sanitary installations, carpentry, and interior finishes.
